message:
test(bd-2697): add unit tests for proxy.rs edge cases

Cover lock-poison error path, from_template/from_template_with_prefix
external_uri tracking, call_tool with progress reporter, read_with_uri
without slash in resource URI, resource_templates via ProxyCatalog,
resource_from_template icon copying, and explicit no-progress call path.

Server tests: 1244 → 1253

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
